case_title: FAZIO, PETER vs. WALK-ERWIN, BARBARA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAZIO, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT WALK-ERWIN, BARBARA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAZIO, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALK-ERWIN, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665 EDDY ST #37, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
